metadata.description: Marketplace for the disasm-codemode plugin (drive a decompiler's code-mode MCP for RE / patch-diff / bug hunting).

plugins.name: disasm-codemode
plugins.description: Drive a disassembler/decompiler headlessly via its code-mode MCP for reverse engineering, binary patch-diffing, and memory-safety bug-class scanning. First implementation: Binary Ninja.
